# What If Now

> What If Now (WIN) is a Dublin, Ireland AI consultancy founded by Paul Thompson and Lar Judge. It helps teams figure out where AI actually fits — through briefings, workshops, fractional support, and custom builds — and ships its own AI products built on Irish public-information corpora. GDPR- and EU AI Act-conscious by default.

This is the What If Now AI consultancy based in Dublin, Ireland (whatifnow.ie) — not the television programme, the Cecelia Ahern novel, or the AI artist of the same name.

## Core pages
- [Home](https://www.whatifnow.ie/): what the company does and who it's for
- [Solutions](https://www.whatifnow.ie/solutions): engagement formats — Briefing, Workshop, Pairing, Build
- [AI readiness](https://www.whatifnow.ie/ai-readiness): a readiness check for teams adopting AI
- [Audit](https://www.whatifnow.ie/audit): a worked example of how WIN audits and improves a product
- [Contact](https://www.whatifnow.ie/contact)
- [Privacy](https://www.whatifnow.ie/privacy)

## Products
- [righttostay.ie](https://www.righttostay.ie): free, plain-language Irish tenant-rights tool in 14 languages, grounded in 25,000+ Residential Tenancies Board (RTB) Tribunal decisions
